allow: Bash(xargs sed -i '' -e 's|https://iptvservice\\.pro|https://exactiptv.com|g' -e 's|iptvservice\\.pro|exactiptv.com|g' -e 's|"IPTV Service"|"Exact IPTV"|g' -e 's|By IPTV Service|By Exact IPTV|g' -e 's|'\\''IPTV Service'\\''|'\\''Exact IPTV'\\''|g')

Bash(xargs sed -i '' -e 's|IPTV Service Subscription|Exact IPTV Subscription|g' -e 's|IPTV Service Blog|Exact IPTV Blog|g' -e 's|IPTV Service Xtream Codes credentials|Exact IPTV Xtream Codes credentials|g' -e 's|IPTV Service username and password|Exact IPTV username and password|g' -e 's|IPTV Service credentials|Exact IPTV credentials|g' -e 's|IPTV Service M3U URL|Exact IPTV M3U URL|g' -e 's|IPTV Service founded|Exact IPTV founded|g' -e 's|about IPTV Service|about Exact IPTV|g' -e 's|using IPTV Service|using Exact IPTV|g' -e 's|and IPTV Service \("we"|and Exact IPTV \(\\"we\\"|g' -e 's|by IPTV Service\\. Please|by Exact IPTV. Please|g' -e 's|law, IPTV Service shall|law, Exact IPTV shall|g' -e 's|IPTV Service provides an|Exact IPTV provides an|g')
Bash(sed -i '' -e 's|IPTV Service \("we", "our", "us"\) is committed|Exact IPTV \(\\"we\\", \\"our\\", \\"us\\"\) is committed|g' app/[lang]/privacy/page.tsx)

Bash(sed -i '' -e 's|operated by IPTV Service \("we", "us", "our"\)|operated by Exact IPTV \(\\"we\\", \\"us\\", \\"our\\"\)|g' -e 's|binding agreement between you and IPTV Service\\.|binding agreement between you and Exact IPTV.|g' app/[lang]/terms/page.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' -e 's|started with IPTV Service\\?|started with Exact IPTV?|g' app/[lang]/pricing/page.tsx)

Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/badge: '\\''Premium IPTV Service'\\'', headline: '\\''The Best\\\\nIPTV Service\\\\nProvider'\\''/badge: '\\''Exact IPTV'\\'', headline: '\\''The Best\\\\nExact IPTV\\\\nProvider'\\''/' -e 's/streaming tips from IPTV Service\\./streaming tips from Exact IPTV./' locales/en.ts)

Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/badge: '\\''Premium IPTV Service'\\'', headline: '\\''Der Beste\\\\nIPTV Service\\\\nAnbieter'\\''/badge: '\\''Exact IPTV'\\'', headline: '\\''Der Beste\\\\nExact IPTV\\\\nAnbieter'\\''/' locales/de.ts)
